creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #1)
> It does exist if ports-mgmt/poudriere or ports-mgmt/poudriere-devel ports
> are installed though.

Hmmm... unfortunately the doc page just points users to a link. It doesn't say that "you must install package X in order to access the documentation".

Good catch though -- thanks for the info!
